subject: Life Skills
title: My Body
tagline: Learn your body parts and how they help you every day!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What part of your body do you see with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Eyes.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What part of your body do you hear with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Ears.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What part of your body do you smell with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Nose.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What part of your body do you taste with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Tongue.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What part of your body pumps blood?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Heart.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: What part of your body helps you breathe?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Lungs.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: What part of your body helps you think?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Brain.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What part of your body do you chew with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Teeth.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What part of your body do you walk with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Legs.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: What part of your body do you hold things with?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Hands.

stages.name: Stage 11
stages.question: What covers and protects your body?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Skin.

stages.name: Stage 12
stages.question: What joint helps your arm bend?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Elbow.

stages.name: Stage 13
stages.question: What part of your body pushes air in and out?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Lungs.

stages.name: Stage 14
stages.question: What organ helps digest your food?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Stomach.

stages.name: Stage 15
stages.question: What part of your body has fingers?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Hands.
